import torch
for p in ['checkpoints/model.pt', 'checkpoints/model_v2.pt']:
    ck = torch.load(p, map_location='cpu')
    state = ck['model'] if 'model' in ck else ck
    keys = list(state.keys())
    print(p, 'num_keys=', len(keys), 'first5=', keys[:3], 'has_module_prefix=', any(k.startswith('module.') for k in keys))
    # check if keys after strip match
    stripped = [k.replace('module.','') for k in keys]
    print('  stripped first5=', stripped[:3])
